Title: An unconventionally secreted effector from the root knot nematode Meloidogyne incognita, Mi-ISC-1, promotes parasitism by disrupting salicylic acid biosynthesis in host plants

Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Salicylic acid biosynthesis via the isochorismate pathway
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Isochorismate branch of chorismate metabolism / cytosolic SA biosynthesis module
Pathway_Genes.Metabolic_Step_Position: branch point / competing side-route acting on isochorismate in host cytoplasm
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydrolyses isochorismate to 2,3-dihydro-2,3-dihydroxybenzoate, thereby depleting the isochorismate pool available for salicylic acid biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Plant immunity and defence against pathogens
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site: Leaf tissue cytoplasm-associated SA biosynthesis context in Nicotiana benthamiana
Pathway_Genes.Subcellular_Localization: Cytoplasm; nucleus when transiently expressed in plant cells; not plastid; not apoplast
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Expressed in subventral oesophageal gland cells; low in eggs and pre-J2, strongly up-regulated in parasitic J2 and highest in J3, then reduced in J4 and females
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Transient ectopic expression in Nicotiana benthamiana leaves
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Reduces SA and SAG accumulation, suppresses PR1 expression, promotes Phytophthora capsici infection, and contributes to Meloidogyne incognita parasitism
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Not established; acts as a competing enzyme that disrupts a key precursor pool for SA production
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Phytophthora capsici infection; Agrobacterium-mediated transient expression; de novo SA pathway reconstitution in leaf cytoplasm
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: TRV-mediated in planta RNAi of Mi-isc-1 during nematode infection; in vitro enzyme assay with purified protein; transient expression in Nicotiana benthamiana; SA/SAG HPLC metabolite profiling; PR1 expression assay; P. capsici infection assay; subcellular localization with NLS/NES variants; reconstitution of SA biosynthesis using Arabidopsis PBS3/SID1/SID2
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for engineering nematode resistance by host-induced gene silencing, RNAi, or blocking effector delivery/function to preserve SA-mediated defence
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Mi-isc-1 encodes a functional isochorismatase effector from Meloidogyne incognita expressed in subventral oesophageal glands and induced during parasitic stages. 2. Mi-ISC-1 hydrolyses isochorismate and suppresses host salicylic acid accumulation, SAG levels, and PR1 expression. 3. Cytoplasmic localization is required for its virulence activity, and silencing Mi-isc-1 reduces nematode galls and egg masses. 4. Mi-ISC-1 suppresses SA production in a reconstituted Arabidopsis-derived isochorismate SA pathway in Nicotiana benthamiana.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Although unconventionally secreted from yeast and presumably nematodes, its secretory signal is not recognized by the plant secretory pathway, causing retention inside plant cells. The effector primarily acts in the host cytoplasm rather than plastids.
